name: alonso-skills/postgres-writing-guidelines
summary: Use when writing or reviewing PostgreSQL/PL-pgSQL, designing table schemas, writing functions and procedures, building migrations, defining domains, or architecting a Postgres application database. Also use when writing RAISE EXCEPTION patterns, BEFORE/AFTER triggers for cross-table constraints, base/subtype hierarchies, composite key designs, row-level security policies, or idempotent DDL scripts. If you are touching Postgres for an application database, use this skill. PostgreSQL-specific — examples will not run on other engines.
